2605.02259.title: An Information-theoretic Propagation Denoising and Fusion Framework for Fake News Detection
2605.02259.paper_summary: Incomplete propagation data significantly hinders robust fake news detection. Recent approaches leverage large language models to simulate missing user interactions via role-playing, thereby enriching propagation with synthetic signals. However, such propagation data is intrinsically unreliable, and directly fusing it can lead to biased representations, leading to limited detection performance. In this paper, we alleviate the unreliability of synthetic propagation from the mutual information perspective and propose a novel information-theoretic propagation denoising and fusion (InfoPDF) framework to learn effective representations from both real and synthetic propagation. Specifically, we first generate attribute-specific synthetic propagation using large language models. Then we model each synthetic propagation graph as a probabilistic latent distribution to guide reliability-aware adaptive fusion with real propagation. During training, we design a mutual information-based objective to learn compressed and task-sufficient propagation representations. It jointly suppresses noisy signals across attribute-specific synthetic propagation, maintains consistency between real and synthetic propagation representations, and ensures task sufficiency for fake news detection and attribute prediction. Experiments on three real-world datasets show that InfoPDF consistently achieves superior performance across various fake news detection tasks. Further analysis demonstrates that InfoPDF can estimate attribute-level reliabilities and learn more discriminative propagation representations.
2605.02259.paper_summary_zh: 不完整的傳播數據顯著阻礙了穩健的假新聞檢測。最近的方法利用大型語言模型通過角色扮演來模擬缺失的用戶互動，從而用合成信號豐富傳播。然而，這種傳播數據本質上是不可靠的，直接融合它可能導致偏見的表示，從而限制檢測性能。在本文中，我們從互信息的角度緩解合成傳播的不可靠性，並提出了一種新穎的信息論傳播去噪和融合（InfoPDF）框架，以從真實和合成傳播中學習有效的表示。具體而言，我們首先使用大型語言模型生成屬性特定的合成傳播。然後，我們將每個合成傳播圖建模為概率潛在分佈，以指導對真實傳播的可靠性感知自適應融合。在訓練過程中，我們設計了一個基於互信息的目標，以學習壓縮和任務充分的傳播表示。它共同抑制屬性特定合成傳播中的噪聲信號，保持真實和合成傳播表示之間的一致性，並確保假新聞檢測和屬性預測的任務充分性。在三個真實世界數據集上的實驗顯示，InfoPDF在各種假新聞檢測任務中始終實現了優越的性能。進一步的分析表明，InfoPDF可以估計屬性級別的可靠性並學習更具區分性的傳播表示。
2605.02259.author: Mengyang Chen et.al.
2605.02259.authors: Mengyang Chen, Lingwei Wei, Wei Zhou, Songlin Hu
